"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as MenubarPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-menubar"
import { Check, ChevronRight, Circle } from "lucide-react"
import { tw } from "~/tw";

function MenubarMenu({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Menu>) {
  return <MenubarPrimitive.Menu {...props} />
}

function MenubarGroup({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Group>) {
  return <MenubarPrimitive.Group {...props} />
}

function MenubarPortal({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Portal>) {
  return <MenubarPrimitive.Portal {...props} />
}

function MenubarRadioGroup({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof MenubarPrimitive.RadioGroup>) {
  return <MenubarPrimitive.RadioGroup {...props} />
}

function MenubarSub({
  ...props
}: React.ComponentProps<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Sub>) {
  return <MenubarPrimitive.Sub data-slot="menubar-sub" {...props} />
}


const menubarMenubarPrimitiveRoot = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    height: "h-9",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    margin: "space-x-1",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    borderWidth: "border",
    backgroundColor: "bg-background",
    padding: "p-1",
    boxShadow: "shadow-sm",
});

const Menubar = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Root>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Root>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.Root
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(menubarMenubarPrimitiveRoot.class(), className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
Menubar.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.Root.displayName


const menubarTriggerMenubarPrimitiveTrigger = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    cursor: "cursor-default",
    userSelect: "select-none",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
    padding: ["px-3", "py-1"],
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    fontWeight: "font-medium",
    outlineStyle: "outline-none",
    focus: {
        backgroundColor: "focus:bg-accent",
        color: "focus:text-accent-foreground",
    },
    "data-[state=open]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[state=open]:bg-accent",
        color: "data-[state=open]:text-accent-foreground",
    },
});

const MenubarTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Trigger>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Trigger>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.Trigger
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(menubarTriggerMenubarPrimitiveTrigger.class(), className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
MenubarTrigger.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.Trigger.displayName


const menubarSubTriggerMenubarPrimitiveSubTrigger = tw.style({
    display: "flex",
    cursor: "cursor-default",
    userSelect: "select-none",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
    padding: ["px-2", "py-1.5"],
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    outlineStyle: "outline-none",
    focus: {
        backgroundColor: "focus:bg-accent",
        color: "focus:text-accent-foreground",
    },
    "data-[state=open]": {
        backgroundColor: "data-[state=open]:bg-accent",
        color: "data-[state=open]:text-accent-foreground",
    },
});

const MenubarSubTrigger = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.SubTrigger>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.SubTrigger> & {
    inset?: boolean
  }
>(({ className, inset, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.SubTrigger
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(menubarSubTriggerMenubarPrimitiveSubTrigger.class(), inset && "pl-8", className)}
    {...props}
  >
    {children}
    <ChevronRight className={tw.join("ml-auto h-4 w-4")} />
  </MenubarPrimitive.SubTrigger>
))
MenubarSubTrigger.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.SubTrigger.displayName


const menubarSubContentMenubarPrimitiveSubContent = tw.style({
    zIndex: "z-50",
    minWidth: "min-w-[8rem]",
    overflow: "overflow-hidden",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    borderWidth: "border",
    backgroundColor: "bg-popover",
    padding: "p-1",
    color: "text-popover-foreground",
    boxShadow: "shadow-lg",
    transformOrigin: "origin-[--radix-menubar-content-transform-origin]",
});

const MenubarSubContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.SubContent>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.SubContent>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.SubContent
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(menubarSubContentMenubarPrimitiveSubContent.class(), className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
MenubarSubContent.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.SubContent.displayName


const menubarContentMenubarPrimitiveContent = tw.style({
    zIndex: "z-50",
    minWidth: "min-w-[12rem]",
    overflow: "overflow-hidden",
    borderRadius: "rounded-md",
    borderWidth: "border",
    backgroundColor: "bg-popover",
    padding: "p-1",
    color: "text-popover-foreground",
    boxShadow: "shadow-md",
    transformOrigin: "origin-[--radix-menubar-content-transform-origin]",
});

const MenubarContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Content>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Content>
>(
  (
    { className, align = "start", alignOffset = -4, sideOffset = 8, ...props },
    ref
  ) => (
    <MenubarPrimitive.Portal>
      <MenubarPrimitive.Content
        ref={ref}
        align={align}
        alignOffset={alignOffset}
        sideOffset={sideOffset}
        className={tw.join(menubarContentMenubarPrimitiveContent.class(), className)}
        {...props}
      />
    </MenubarPrimitive.Portal>
  )
)
MenubarContent.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.Content.displayName


const menubarItemMenubarPrimitiveItem = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    display: "flex",
    cursor: "cursor-default",
    userSelect: "select-none",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
    padding: ["px-2", "py-1.5"],
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    outlineStyle: "outline-none",
    focus: {
        backgroundColor: "focus:bg-accent",
        color: "focus:text-accent-foreground",
    },
    "data-[disabled]": {
        pointerEvents: "data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none",
        opacity: "data-[disabled]:opacity-50",
    },
});

const MenubarItem = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Item>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Item> & {
    inset?: boolean
  }
>(({ className, inset, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.Item
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(menubarItemMenubarPrimitiveItem.class(), inset && "pl-8", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
MenubarItem.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.Item.displayName


const menubarRadioItemSpan = tw.style({
    position: "absolute",
    left: "left-2",
    display: "flex",
    height: "h-3.5",
    width: "w-3.5",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    justifyContent: "justify-center",
});

const menubarRadioItemMenubarPrimitiveRadioItem = tw.style({
    position: "relative",
    display: "flex",
    cursor: "cursor-default",
    userSelect: "select-none",
    alignItems: "items-center",
    borderRadius: "rounded-sm",
    padding: ["py-1.5", "pl-8", "pr-2"],
    fontSize: "text-sm",
    outlineStyle: "outline-none",
    focus: {
        backgroundColor: "focus:bg-accent",
        color: "focus:text-accent-foreground",
    },
    "data-[disabled]": {
        pointerEvents: "data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none",
        opacity: "data-[disabled]:opacity-50",
    },
});

const MenubarCheckboxItem = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.CheckboxItem>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.CheckboxItem>
>(({ className, children, checked, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.CheckboxItem
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(menubarRadioItemMenubarPrimitiveRadioItem.class(), className)}
    checked={checked}
    {...props}
  >
    <span className={menubarRadioItemSpan.class()}>
      <MenubarPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
        <Check className={tw.join("h-4 w-4")} />
      </MenubarPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
    </span>
    {children}
  </MenubarPrimitive.CheckboxItem>
))
MenubarCheckboxItem.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.CheckboxItem.displayName

const MenubarRadioItem = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.RadioItem>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.RadioItem>
>(({ className, children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.RadioItem
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join(menubarRadioItemMenubarPrimitiveRadioItem.class(), className)}
    {...props}
  >
    <span className={menubarRadioItemSpan.class()}>
      <MenubarPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
        <Circle className={tw.join("h-4 w-4 fill-current")} />
      </MenubarPrimitive.ItemIndicator>
    </span>
    {children}
  </MenubarPrimitive.RadioItem>
))
MenubarRadioItem.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.RadioItem.displayName

const MenubarLabel = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Label>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Label> & {
    inset?: boolean
  }
>(({ className, inset, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.Label
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("px-2 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold", inset && "pl-8", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
MenubarLabel.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.Label.displayName

const MenubarSeparator = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Separator>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof MenubarPrimitive.Separator>
>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
  <MenubarPrimitive.Separator
    ref={ref}
    className={tw.join("-mx-1 my-1 h-px bg-muted", className)}
    {...props}
  />
))
MenubarSeparator.displayName = MenubarPrimitive.Separator.displayName

const MenubarShortcut = ({
  className,
  ...props
}: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>) => {
  return (
    <span
      className={tw.join("ml-auto text-xs tracking-widest text-muted-foreground", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}
MenubarShortcut.displayname = "MenubarShortcut"

export {
  Menubar,
  MenubarMenu,
  MenubarTrigger,
  MenubarContent,
  MenubarItem,
  MenubarSeparator,
  MenubarLabel,
  MenubarCheckboxItem,
  MenubarRadioGroup,
  MenubarRadioItem,
  MenubarPortal,
  MenubarSubContent,
  MenubarSubTrigger,
  MenubarGroup,
  MenubarSub,
  MenubarShortcut,
}
